title: Polymerase Chain Reaction (PCR) - DNA barcoding
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"5o81b","text":"PCR conditions: 95°C (2min), 35 cycles of 94°C (30sec), 54°C (30sec) and 72°C (1min), followed by 72°C (10min).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"7riu8","text":"Sterile H2O; dNTP mix (1.25 mM); buffer 10X (200 mM Tris-HCl (pH = 8,4) + 500 mM KCl); MgCl2 (50 mM); Primer Fish F1 and Fish R1 (5µM); Taq DNA polymerase.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
